narrative:
Union Twp. township has 2,094 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 44.2 percentage points.
